warm-spiced-wine.name: Warm Spiced Wine
instructions: Combine merlot, sugar, orange peels, lemon peels, cinnamon sticks, cloves, and nutmeg in a saucepan over medium heat; simmer until sugar is dissolved and flavors have blended, 10 to 15 minutes.

watermelon-fish-snack-for-kids.name: Watermelon Fish Snack For Kids

ingredients.item: Slice (0.5 oz) triangular slice of watermelon

instructions: Place watermelon triangle on a plate with pointed side facing left. Place 1 blueberry on triangle for fish eye; place remaining 4 blueberries above fish's "mouth" for air bubbles.
Cut a tiny curved sliver papaya for fish's mouth; place on watermelon. Flip papaya triangle over and place at end of watermelon fish for tail fin.

watermelon-mango-ice-pops.name: Watermelon Mango Ice Pops
instructions: Place watermelon, mango, raspberries, and lemon juice in a blender; blend until smooth. Pour watermelon mixture into ice pop molds; insert handles or sticks.
Freeze until firm, at least 4 hours.

white-chocolate-and-tangerine-mousse-tel.name: White Chocolate And Tangerine Mousse

ingredients.item: Raspas de chocolate branco para decorar

instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water. Break the chocolate in pieces and melt them in a sea bath. Reserve.
Put the milk and the tangerines in a pot and bring it to the heat until boiling. Remove from the fire and add the rolled gelatin leaves, stirring until they dissolve.
Pass the previous preparation through a hammock pusher, lie on the melted white chocolate, stir and let it cool. On the other hand, whip the cream into whipped cream not too firm.
Carefully wrap the chocolate cream with the whipped cream. Lie down in little pans and take it to the fridge for at least 3 hours. Decorate with the tangerines and white chocolate shavings and serve.

white-cranberry-sangria.name: White Cranberry Sangria
instructions: In a large pitcher, combine the orange, lime, cranberries, simple syrup, vodka, orange liqueur, white cranberry juice, and white wine. Stir well, then chill until ready to serve, up to 2 days.
Immediately before serving, add the lemon-lime soda and stir to incorporate.
Pour into glasses and garnish with orange wedges.
Enjoy!

whole-chicken-pie.name: Whole Chicken Pie

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine onion, carrot, and celery in a bowl. Add garlic, rosemary, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper. Drizzle in olive oil. Mix stuffing well.

Trim away the wing tips of the chicken. Season the whole surface and cavity generously with salt. Spoon the stuffing into the cavity, reserving any extra for the sauce later. Tie the legs together with string. Refrigerate until ready to wrap.

Place dough onto a well floured surface. Sprinkle more flour on top. Roll out into a large circle about 1/8 inch thick. Place chicken, breast-side down, in the center of the dough. Wrap dough over the chicken. Cut off sections of excess dough and patch them over areas with less coverage.

Beat egg and water together and brush some egg wash over the redistributed dough. Press the rest of dough into the new seams. Continue folding dough over the chicken, brushing with egg wash and patching pieces together as needed, until chicken is fully covered. Do not stretch the dough too thin.
Flip chicken over onto a baking sheet lined with a silicone mat. Press on the inside of both legs to enhance their shape. Refrigerate until crust is cold, about 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Brush the remaining egg wash all over the chicken. Sprinkle fleur de sel on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is beautifully browned, about 1 hour and 10 minutes. Transfer chicken to a pie dish and let rest while preparing the sauce, 30 minutes to 1 hour.

Cut a small hole into the back of the chicken and spoon out 1/2 cup of the stuffing. Place in a saucepan with 1 tablespoon butter. Add a pinch of salt. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until vegetables are tender, about 3 minutes. Add wine and the pan drippings. Cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced by half, about 4 minutes. Add cold butter. Turn off heat and stir sauce vigorously until butter melts.
Slice chicken and serve with the sauce.

whole-wheat-bread.name: Whole Wheat Bread
instructions: Mix warm water, yeast, and 1/3 cup honey in a large bowl to dissolve.
Add 5 cups bread flour, and stir to combine.
Let sit for 30 minutes, or until big and bubbly.
Mix in 3 tablespoons melted butter, remaining 1/3 cup honey, and salt. Stir in 2 cups whole wheat flour.
Transfer dough to a floured work surface and gradually knead in remaining 2 cups whole wheat flour.
Knead until dough starts to pull away from the work surface, adding more whole wheat flour if necessary; dough should be a bit tacky to the touch, but not too sticky.
Place in a greased bowl, turning once to coat the surface of the dough.
Cover with a dish towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled, 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Grease three 9x5-inch loaf pans. Punch down the dough, and divide it into 3 loaves.
Place in the prepared loaf pans, and allow to rise until dough has topped the pans by one inch, another 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Bake the risen loaves in the preheated oven until golden brown for 25 to 30 minutes, do not overbake.
Lightly brush the tops of the loaves with remaining 2 tablespoons melted butter when done to prevent crust from getting hard.
Cool completely. Enjoy!

wind-fritters-recipe-comedera.name: Wind Fritters Recipe
instructions: Inicia la receta y agrega en un bol harina de trigo y la leche.
It later incorporates the egg and the vanilla extract. With the help of a balloon-type mixer, mix very well until you have a homogeneous mass. Cover and let rest for 10 minutes.
After that time, heat up a frying pan with enough oil.
Luego, toma tu molde e inserta en el aceite caliente para que tome temperatura.
Immediately pour the hot mold into the mixture to stick and finally re-enter the oil. With the help of a stick, go and get his mug.
Deja dorar un par de minutos y voltea. Termina de cocinar hasta que queden bien doraditos.
Remove from frying pan and place onto an absorbing paper. Repeat this process until you do all the frills.
Mezcla el harina y la canela hasta que se integren.
Then put the fringes through this mix till they cover up.
Enjoy!

witch-fingers-recipe-for-halloween-comed.name: Witch Fingers Recipe For Halloween
witch-fingers-recipe-for-halloween-comed.original_name: Receta de dedos de bruja para Halloween

ingredients.item: Almendras cortadas por la mitad (al gusto)

instructions: Add butter to a mixer with sugar. Bat with the rods for 5 minutes till smooth and whiteness.
Posteriormente, agrega el huevo y la esencia de vainilla y termina de mezclar.
Then you will add milk, flour and bate gradually until you get a smooth and manageable mass.
Haz de tu masa una bola y deja reposar a temperatura ambiente por 10 minutos para que compacte un poco.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
After his resting time, he takes his dough and divides into small portions. Then take the portions and give them cylinder shape to shape as a finger.
Then take the knife or a fork and draw the shape of knuckles and so forth.
Put an almond at the end of his finger so that it looks like a fingernail.
Coloca los dedos en una bandeja engrasada y hornea por 15 minutos aproximadamente.
When ready, get them out of the oven and let them stand to room temperature.
Con los colorantes negro y rojo, pinta para que se asemeje a los dedos de una bruja.
Enjoy Halloween!
